propositions: All prose references to autosubmit, the auto-lander, the land/land-status command, lander_down, and the FFO Gerrit workflow are now inaccurate after the bot and FFO were dropped.

The live-guidance files must be rewritten to document landing via a plain Gerrit Submit once LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 with no unresolved comments, with main set to Rebase-If-Necessary so Gerrit rebases and submits server-side.
The retired autolander SSM-token row must be removed from docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md.
Historical ADRs 0040 and 0042 get a 'Superseded by ADR 0047' banner while ADRs 0025 and 0041 get a Rebase-If-Necessary pointer-note.

Broad terms auto-lander/FFO/fast-forward-only legitimately survive in historical ADRs, the ADR-0047 filename links, and the GitHub-mirror replication refspec, which is a different concept and out of scope.
The docs-index/dead-link checker and lint/typecheck/test must pass after the sweep.
